channel.title: Scraping on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Scraping on Arrans github.io

item.title: mendableai/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.

item.title: gocolly/colly
item.description: Elegant Scraper and Crawler Framework for Golang

item.title: lnenad/newser
item.description: Newser is a simple utility to generate a pdf with you favorite news articles
